name: currency.js
when_to_use: 需要小体积的单币种金额运算、分摊与格式化时用它而非手写,因为原生 Number 加 toFixed 在链式误差、最小单位和余数分配上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认用浮点数运算后再 toFixed(2),做不到保证内部整数值、显示值和分摊总和一致;currency.js 以最小单位整数闭环这些步骤。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written code when you need small-footprint single-currency arithmetic, allocation, and formatting, because native Number plus toFixed fails at chained errors, minor units, and remainder distribution.
en.why_valuable: AI normally performs floating-point arithmetic and then calls toFixed(2), which cannot guarantee that the internal integer value, displayed value, and allocated total agree; currency.js closes these steps around integers in the minor unit.

data_in.note: amount is passed to currency(value,options); operations preserves the monetary operation order, and split_count uses the native distribute method so remainders remain included in the total of all shares.

schema.split_count?: integer > 0 -- omitted by default; no allocation

data_in.note: amount 交给 currency(value,options);operations 保持金额链顺序,split_count 使用原生 distribute 保证余数仍计入各份总和。

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;零依赖纯 JS money value-object。
provides.outputs: {value:number,intValue:integer,formatted:string,parts?:string[]}；parts 来自 distribute,所有份额之和等于原金额。

peer.note: 它适合单币种本地计算和显示;需要显式 ISO 币种、scale 与比例分配时改用 dinero-js。

boot.note: step.op 必须按 schema 白名单校验;currency.js 不做实时汇率与跨币种换算。

isolation.evidence: currency.d.ts exposes only add/subtract/multiply/divide (Constructor value+opts), distribute(count):Array<currency>, format():string, readonly value/intValue — boot maps plus/minus/times/divide→add/subtract/multiply/divide and split_count→distribute correctly, and reads value/intValue/format()/distribute().map(format). Options interface confirms all schema keys real (precision/symbol/separator/decimal/pattern/negativePattern/fromCents/errorOnInvalid/increment). Zero DOM/CSS/event API — pure headless money value-object, nothing renders, shadow-irrelevant (safe).
